label: Ethane staggered
teacher_note: Staggered ethane is lower in energy; dihedral angles between front and back H atoms are 60°.

label: Ethane eclipsed
teacher_note: Eclipsed ethane is highest in energy for this molecule; H–H torsional strain (~1 kcal/mol per eclipsed pair).

label: Butane anti
teacher_note: Anti conformation of butane is lowest in energy; the two methyl groups are farthest apart (180° dihedral).

label: Butane gauche
teacher_note: Gauche conformation; methyl groups are 60° apart. ~0.9 kcal/mol above anti.

label: Butane eclipsed CH3/H
teacher_note: Partially eclipsed; CH3 eclipses H. ~3.8 kcal/mol above anti.

label: Butane fully eclipsed CH3/CH3
teacher_note: Highest-energy conformation; methyl groups eclipse each other (~5.5 kcal/mol above anti).

label: Haloalkane (front H/H/X, back H/H/R)
teacher_note: Generic haloalkane template. Replace X with halogen and R with substituent.
